metadata.note: Dry-run-only proof payload for a document-backed Peru balsam resinoid candidate. Do not real-apply unless a product-specific SDS or another trusted source confirms the canonical target fit.

notes: Document-backed from the downloaded Peru_Balsam_Signature_Resinoid.pdf file in the source-document registry.
Local extraction shows the PDF content is actually an EPA/CCID page titled 'Balsams, peru' with CAS 8007-00-9 and Peru balsam oil-style synonyms.
Use this payload for dry-run inspection only unless a product-specific SDS or another trusted source confirms the CAS belongs to the resinoid canonical target.
